name.en: National Institute of Statistics and Informatics of Peru (INEI)
name.zh: 秘鲁国家统计和信息学研究所

description.en: The National Institute of Statistics and Informatics (Instituto Nacional de Estadística e Informática, INEI) is the official statistical agency of Peru, responsible for producing and disseminating official national statistics covering economic activity, population, employment, prices, trade, and social conditions. INEI conducts national censuses, household surveys, and compiles key macroeconomic indicators for Peru.
description.zh: 秘鲁国家统计和信息学研究所（INEI）是秘鲁官方统计机构，负责生产和发布涵盖经济活动、人口、就业、价格、贸易和社会状况的官方国家统计数据。INEI开展全国人口普查、家庭调查，并编制秘鲁主要宏观经济指标。

en: GDP and national accounts by sector
National household survey (ENAHO) - poverty and living conditions
Foreign trade statistics by product and partner country
Regional and subnational statistics by department
zh: 消费者价格指数（IPC）与通货膨胀
全国家庭调查（ENAHO）- 贫困与生活条件
按产品和伙伴国分类的对外贸易统计
工业生产与制造业产出
按省份的地区和次国家统计
